name: Envela Corp
business: Envela is a provider of recommerce and recycling services. Its consumer segment sells authenticated luxury goods including pre-owned fine jewelry, diamonds, gemstones, luxury watches, and secondary-market bullion. Its commercial segment provides IT asset disposition, product return services, and de-manufacturing of end-of-life electronics to reclaim base and precious metals.

exposures.sentence: Silver also provides a unique demand thesis as it is also utilized in industrial applications. Its demand in industrial applications is being driven by battery energy storage, AI-driven data centers, and electric vehicles.
